title: Watchlight payload
description: Freshness metadata and server-provided screens rendered by Watchlight.

ts.description: Unix timestamp in seconds when the provider read the source data. The firmware treats it as metadata and measures freshness from its own last successful fetch.

staleAfter.description: Maximum seconds without an accepted fetch before remote screens are replaced by the offline alert.

rgbColor.description: A web-style RGB color encoded as #rrggbb.

iconRow.description: One icon row, ordered from left to right.

icon.description: An 8×8 RGB icon. Rows are ordered top-to-bottom.

id.description: Stable identifier for the screen. It should be unique within the payload.

text.description: Pre-formatted printable ASCII text. The firmware stores at most 15 bytes; practical visual width is shorter.

icon.description: An 8×8 matrix of web-style RGB colors.
